name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Runs COM Object via Verclsid
notes:
This Building Block detects when verclsid.exe is used to run COM object via GUID.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Victor Sergeev, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Verclsid.exe Runs COM Object
SIGMA Description: Detects when verclsid.exe is used to run COM object via GUID


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Runs COM Object via Verclsid on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of verclsid.exe
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/s%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/c%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Runs COM Object via Verclsid on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of verclsid.exe
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/s%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/c%') AQL filter query
